feature.name: Copilot Daily Actions Gap Closure
feature.summary: Close the top 10 execution gaps between existing Copilot capabilities and dependable day-to-day user outcomes. Prioritize one-shot orchestration, write reliability, and verification loops before adding new surface area.

objectives: Make common user asks complete in one command
Increase trust in write actions with deterministic safety and verification
Reduce ambiguity handling failures with structured user disambiguation
Improve operational quality using reconciliation, idempotency, and auditability

stories.title: Build one-shot orchestration layer for common daily asks
acceptance: Add a canonical orchestration contract for plain-language tasks like 'prep my day', 'fix contact-company link', and 'send follow-up pack'
Single invocation can execute multiple existing skills with explicit step states: planned, running, succeeded, failed
Orchestration emits user-readable completion summary with deterministic step ordering
Failure in one step does not silently skip remaining required steps; partial-state handling is explicit

stories.title: Ship deterministic CRM write reliability guardrails
acceptance: All write actions route through a single write policy adapter with operation class, source-of-truth hints, and retry policy
Association writes validate foreign keys and ownership before update
Write failures emit typed errors suitable for user-facing fallback guidance
Introduce automatic verification re-read after mutation and return canonical success/failure payload

stories.title: Implement association-aware mutation paths
acceptance: Copilot resolves relationship writes through FK or junction tables instead of display fields
Contact-company relink supports create-or-link flow with idempotent behavior
Mutation response includes old relation and new relation identifiers
User receives explicit guidance when relationship model is ambiguous or unsupported

stories.title: Add structured disambiguation prompts for duplicate matches
acceptance: When multiple contacts or companies match, Copilot returns compact choice cards instead of failing
Disambiguation supports single-select and multi-select where appropriate
Selected resolution persists only for current workflow unless user confirms persistent preference
Ambiguity resolution includes enough metadata to avoid wrong-entity writes

stories.title: Standardize before/after verification output for every write
acceptance: Every write action emits normalized payload: intent, target entity, before snapshot, after snapshot, verification status
Verification failure marks action as partial and surfaces retry guidance
User-facing response templates can render proof without exposing sensitive internals
Telemetry captures verification pass/fail per action type

stories.title: Add cross-system reconciliation for HubSpot and app records
acceptance: Define field-level source-of-truth policy for contact, company, and deal mutations
Reconciliation worker detects and resolves drift with explicit conflict strategy
Queue retries are bounded and observable; poison records are moved to dead-letter handling
Copilot responses include whether changes were local-only, CRM-only, or fully synced

stories.title: Deliver idempotent repair actions for common cleanup tasks
acceptance: Repair actions can be safely re-run and return 'already correct' when no changes are needed
Action handlers compute deterministic identity keys per fix operation
Idempotency applies across retries and repeated user prompts in same session
Result payload distinguishes mutated_count and unchanged_count

stories.title: Introduce transactional multi-step execution with rollback hooks
acceptance: Multi-step mutating workflows support saga-style rollback for reversible steps
Non-reversible steps require explicit HITL confirmation before commit
Workflow state persists for resume/retry without duplicate writes
Action audit records include compensating operations executed

stories.title: Unify daily work queue with ranked priorities and next best action
acceptance: Single queue view aggregates follow-ups, risks, tasks, and commitment debt with a normalized priority score
Each queue item includes recommended action, expected impact, and estimated time
Queue can be requested in one natural-language command and returned in sorted order
Actions launched from queue write back completion state across source systems

stories.title: Close the outcome learning loop for action quality
acceptance: Capture acceptance/rejection/edit outcome for generated drafts and autonomous actions
Store action outcomes with confidence, context, and user correction metadata
Ranking and prompt policies consume outcomes to improve next recommendations
Dashboard metrics expose quality trend by action type and user segment
